_comment: Single source of truth for press coverage. Edit this file, then run: python build-press.py

_fields.url: required - direct link to the article
_fields.headline: required - the article's actual headline, verbatim
_fields.date: required - YYYY-MM-DD if the exact day is known, YYYY-MM if only the month is
_fields.author: optional - byline, omit or null if unknown
_fields.lang: optional - BCP47 code, defaults to en
_fields.accent: optional - hex dot colour, defaults to #b967ff

articles.headline: Nya channels sleepless creativity in latest “Sweet Monster Energy”
articles.description: A single review calling the track a fearless, restless piece of experimental hyperpop — German and English traded mid-verse, every sonic twist deliberate enough that the chaos reads as measured rather than messy.

articles.headline: Nya, RHYMI y Big Romo muestran tres formas de entender la música urbana actual
articles.description: Spanish-language feature placing Nya alongside RHYMI and Big Romo as three separate answers to what urban music sounds like now — hers the glitchy, bilingual, late-night one.
articles.author: Ara CorIza

articles.headline: MIKEY, Nya y yung baker: emociones digitales entre alt pop y honestidad juvenil
articles.description: Spanish-language feature on alt-pop and emotional honesty, covering the glitch production and the German/English switching behind “Denk Wieder an Dich” and “Messer.”
articles.author: Ara CorIza
